security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset:; font-src 'self' data: asset:; connect-src 'self' ipc: tauri: asset:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Native chat client for Undefined Runtime.
bundle.longDescription: A desktop and Android chat client for Undefined Runtime WebChat.
